title: cerasus avium var. sylvestris
intro: Cerasus avium var. sylvestris, also known as the wild cherry or bird cherry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Prunus genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and skin irritations. The health benefits of Cerasus avium var. sylvestris include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the bark, leaves, and flowers of the plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to treat various health conditions.
